card_design_language.base: w-48 h-64 rounded-xl border border-white/10 bg-slate-900 relative overflow-hidden transition-all
card_design_language.shimmer: after:absolute after:inset-0 after:bg-gradient-to-tr after:from-transparent after:via-white/20 after:to-transparent after:-translate-x-full hover:after:translate-x-full after:transition-transform after:duration-700

framer_motion_configs.modal_entry: { initial: { opacity: 0, scale: 0.9, y: 20 }, animate: { opacity: 1, scale: 1, y: 0 }, exit: { opacity: 0, scale: 0.9, y: 20 } }

lobby.container: min-h-screen bg-black flex flex-col items-center justify-center relative p-8 overflow-hidden
lobby.dashboard_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8 w-full max-w-6xl z-10

deckbuilder.split_left: w-2/3 h-full overflow-y-auto p-8 border-r border-white/10 bg-black
deckbuilder.split_right: w-1/3 h-full overflow-y-auto p-8 bg-slate-950/80 backdrop-blur-md

game_board.container: h-screen w-screen bg-black overflow-hidden flex flex-col relative font-mono
game_board.opponent_half: h-1/2 w-full rotate-180 flex flex-col p-4 relative
game_board.player_half: h-1/2 w-full flex flex-col p-4 border-t border-euryx-cyan/20 relative

zones.prize_cards: absolute left-8 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 flex flex-col gap-2
zones.hand: absolute bottom-0 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 flex justify-center -space-x-12 translate-y-1/4 hover:translate-y-0 hover:-space-x-4 transition-all duration-300

hero_background.description: Dark neon geometric abstract background for Lobby
hero_background.usage: bg-cover bg-center opacity-30 mix-blend-screen pointer-events-none absolute inset-0

ambient_texture.description: Cyan fuchsia dark abstract texture for Matchmaking/Deckbuilder
ambient_texture.usage: bg-cover bg-center opacity-20 mix-blend-color-dodge absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none

testing_attributes.requirement: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard React .js files, NOT .tsx. Ensure all components are written using JavaScript and modern React hooks.
Implement Framer Motion heavily. You MUST use layoutId for cards moving between Deck, Hand, Active Spot, and Discard to ensure they 'fly' smoothly across zones.
Ensure the opponent's side of the game board is visually rotated 180deg (rotate-180 class) so cards face the opponent. Shared card components will appear upside down relative to the player.
Do not use native HTML default inputs/selects. Use deeply customized interactive components (e.g., custom Radix or heavily styled divs) to fit the hyper-modern dark neon theme.
The HaloNav must be fixed, glassmorphic, and float above content. Crucially, conditionally hide it entirely when the user is on the /play/[roomId] game board route for a distraction-free view.
Use Lucide React for iconography. Apply the neon text glow shadows to critical icons.
Apply `data-testid` consistently across all buttons, cards, zones, and interactive elements for testing.
Inject the specific Hex codes and shadow values provided in 'tailwind_config_tokens' into the project's tailwind.config.js.
